name: EdwEvtRunCycUpd_EE

text.value: WITH cte_in AS (SELECT TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, MIN(RUN_CYC_NO) AS RUN_CYC_NO, EDW_LOAD_IN FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC WHERE TRGT_SYS_CD = 'IDS' AND SUBJ_CD = 'AHY_SCHEDULING' AND EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N' AND RUN_CYC_NO >= @{pipeline().parameters.BeginCycle} GROUP BY TRGT_SYS_CD, SRC_SYS_CD, SUBJ_CD, EDW_LOAD_IN) UPDATE t SET EDW_LOAD_IN = 'Y' FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.P_RUN_CYC t JOIN cte_in c ON c.SRC_SYS_CD = t.SRC_SYS_CD AND c.TRGT_SYS_CD = t.TRGT_SYS_CD AND c.SUBJ_CD = t.SUBJ_CD AND t.RUN_CYC_NO >= c.RUN_CYC_NO AND t.EDW_LOAD_IN = 'N'

Description:

DESCRIPTION:  Update the P_RUN_CYC table EDW load indicator fields to show those records have been copied to the EDW.
      
        
MODIFICATIONS:

2013-12-3       Archana Palivela          5114                            Original programming (In Parallel)                                EnterpriseWrhsDevl

Annotations:
Update the P_RUN_CYC table to indicate source system data has been loaded to the EDW for each of the run cycles processed.
EdwEvtRunCycUpd
Extract P_RUN_CYC records for IDS Product with a value \"N\" in the  EDW_LOAD_IN where the run cycle is >= to the current run cycle
Set EDW_LOAD_IN to 'Y'
